analysis_method: Framework Method (Gale et al., 2013) with directed content analysis

TH1.name: Inadequacy of existing QA approaches for LLM systems

TH3.name: Transparency as underserved quality gap
TH3.framework_implication: Elevates TI dimension priority; motivates TI-2 metric

TH4.name: Integration reliability distinct from model quality
TH4.framework_implication: Defines IQ dimension as separate from model-level concerns

TH5.name: Need for operationalized thresholds with domain calibration
TH5.framework_implication: Drives threshold specification in Table 3 with domain guidance

TH6.name: Prompt brittleness as robustness failure mode
TH6.framework_implication: Informs RO-1 (Perturbation Sensitivity) and RO-4 design

TH7.name: Regulatory compliance as quality driver
TH7.framework_implication: Motivates TI-4 Audit Trail and SS-2 PII metrics

TH8.name: Tooling fragmentation as adoption barrier
TH8.framework_implication: Motivates QALIS unified toolkit and IQ-4 Observability metric
